content.en:
The weakest of these tribulation beasts hunted by Ye Tian were all more than a hundred tribulations, so their value was much higher than the sixty tribulation beasts hunted before.

Sixty Tribulation Beasts are worth at least 30,000 contribution points, while more than 100 Tribulation Beasts are worth at least 100,000 contribution points.

The thirteen robber beasts that Ye Tian hunted were finally replaced with 2.01 million contribution points, but it didn't take much time for him to accumulate contribution points, so the speed of accumulating contribution points was already extremely fast, if he let the other invincible people in Tianfeng Sea know, I am afraid that he would be jealous to the point of madness.

With so many contribution points, Ye Tian not only has no shortage of resources, even if he enters Jiuyang Mountain to comprehend Jiuyang Fish, he can also comprehend for a long time.

With the passage of time, Ye Tianshen realized a variety of eternal rules, and slowly improved, and the control of various eternal rules continued to improve.

In addition, Ye Tian used the contribution points to buy various treasures that can improve his cultivation, among which the best robbery stones can also be used to improve his cultivation.

As for the top invincible body robbery method of Wanyuan Guiru, Ye Tian's progress is not fast, because he often encounters defects or dangers, and he needs to improve it again and again to ensure that he is extremely suitable for himself, and then he will let his body cultivate.

As a result, his cultivation speed would be much slower.

However, compared to others, Ye Tian's cultivation speed was already countless times faster.

One realm epoch after another years passed, and before he knew it, this time Ye Tian's retreat had surpassed a dark time.

Ye Tian's contribution value is not only not less, but more and more, from more than two million contribution points at the beginning, to more than 10 million contribution points today, and most of the contribution points are not used, only a small part of the contribution value is spent.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian's progress is incomparably great.

"Wanyuan Guiru has finally become smaller!The cultivation has also improved a lot compared to the past, which is equivalent to the late cultivation of a fifth-class invincible!" Ye Tian said happily.

As for the Invincible Ancestral Technique, he could have easily created an Invincible Ancestral Technique, but he was not in a hurry.

If his cultivation is raised to a level that is difficult to improve, and the invincible body is cultivated to the second level of perfection, then he will create another invincible ancestral skill, so as to step into the fourth-rank invincible realm, and the benefits he will gain will be the most.

Although he did not continue to create the invincible ancestral technique, but his perception of the invincible ancestral technique was not low, many invincible ancestral techniques were only one step away from being created, but he did not continue to create, once the cultivation and body robbery were promoted to the peak realm, he could immediately create those unformed invincible ancestral skills immediately.

That's what he intended.

......

Dark Forbidden Realm.

The Terrans have become the only race in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the other races can't survive and are all extinct, and the Terrans occupy most of the entire Dark Forbidden Domain, and only a few areas really have no resources, so they are abandoned by the Terrans.

With the passage of time, the population of the Terrans has become too large, resulting in a lack of use in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and if you are forced to stay in the Dark Forbidden Domain, fighting is inevitable.

Therefore, occupying other exotic worlds, transforming exotic worlds, and adapting to the life of the human race, this is also what the human race urgently needs to do at present.

In fact, any super-name-level force would take this step, such as the original Blood Mist Alliance.

In addition, the forces of Calamity Black Mountain and the Firmament Sword Tomb also have more than one Exotic World, but several Exotic Worlds, all of which are under their control.

As a member of the Heavenly Wind Sea, Ye Tian naturally knew how to transform the Exotic World, so he was ready to make a move on the Exotic World.

"Just choose the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth!"

Ye Tian decided.

this day.

The catastrophe of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth came, and Ye Tian led a famous ancestor of the human race and a few supreme ancestors to descend on the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth.

The Terran race now has a lot of supreme ancestors, after all, Ye Tian can exchange a lot of treasures from the Heavenly Wind Sea, and some treasures are helpful for the ancestors to break through to the supreme ancestor, so the supreme ancestors of the human race are now increasing, and there are dozens of them.

After Ye Tian descended on the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, he immediately exterminated the forces of the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth.

In a short period of time, the forces of the Holy Land Heaven and Earth were wiped out, and even those foreign forces could not compete with the Terrans, so they destroyed the doors one by one, giving up the Holy Land and Earth, and only the super-famous force of the Blood Mist Alliance remained.

------------------------

Blood Mist.

A meeting is being held at the top of the Blood Mist Alliance.

Several deputy alliance leaders of the Blood Mist Alliance were not qualified to participate in this meeting, and those who were eligible to participate in the meeting were the alliance leaders of the Blood Mist Alliance and the three Supreme Elders, the three Supreme Elders almost didn't care about the affairs within the alliance, and spent most of their time cultivating in the Tianlin Realm.

But this time, the three Supreme Elders all returned.

Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor, the leader of the Blood Mist Alliance, spoke: "Three Supreme Elders, the Holy Domain Heaven and Earth was originally one of the heavens and earths we planned to occupy, but I didn't expect that the previous plan failed, and now there is a human power against us, this time it is even more excessive, and even wants to invade the Holy Land Heaven and Earth, and also killed some of our strongest people." "

"What is the strength of the other party?" asked the Immortal Separation Fog Ancestor, one of the three Supreme Elders.

"There are not many supreme powerhouses, and almost all of them are first-level supreme powerhouses, and I have never seen third-level invincible people. The truly powerful is the leader of the human race, the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, who should be an invincible one. Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor said.

The invincible!

The three Supreme Elders frowned, feeling that it was a little difficult to do.

Although there are a total of four invincibles in the Blood Mist Alliance, and the Immortal Separation Mist Ancestor, one of the three Supreme Elders, is even more of a fifth-rank invincible, but the invincible are strong and weak, and the fifth-rank invincible is nothing.

Besides, it's just a holy world, it's not too precious, it's a big deal to change to another exotic world.

At this time, the Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor said again: "According to our information, the strongest of our Blood Mist Alliance once fought with that Ten Thousand Law Ancestor, and the other party was still in the realm of the strongest at that time, and now it has not been long since he became an invincible, and he belongs to the new invincible. If it is forgotten at all, it is equivalent to our Blood Mist Alliance admitting it, and it must not be counted like this!"

The three Supreme Elders felt that it was the same, and it was absolutely impossible to count it like this.

If the other party is a very old invincible, then they should not provoke, but the new invincible is definitely not strong, after all, no matter how demonic the talent is, it also takes time to grow!

Therefore, the Blood Mist Alliance could definitely easily kill a new invincible.

But at this time, the Immortal Fog Ancestor said: "This time the three of you make a move, I can't make a move, you should know very well that we occupy a foreign world, that thing is going to appear, I must stay there all the time, I can't lose a big one because of a small one!"

"Hmm!"

The Blood Shadow Mist Ancestor nodded one after another.
